# bool / filter

The **bool** type's `data-view.filter` capability.

Contributes `DataViewSlots.Filter({ match: "bool", ... })` — an Any/Yes/No
segmented `Control` plus the pure `predicate` / `isActive` applied in the
data-view row pipeline. "Any" clears the filter; "Yes"/"No" keep rows whose
boolean projection matches.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Boolean field type: data-view filter (yes/no segmented control).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `DataViewSlots.Filter` "bool"
  - Uses: `primitives/data-view.DataViewSlots`, `primitives/toggle-chip.SegmentedControl`
